程序包 edu.bupt.ta.model

类 Application

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.model.Application
public class Application extends Object
Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting. Tracks the application status, submission timestamp, and the applicant's availability at the time of submission. Maps to applications.csv.
